notes: The dashboard reflects register rows as extracted, excluding removed records.
Registered supply is calculated from proposed habitat, hedgerow and watercourse extents.
Allocated area and length are calculated from allocation component rows.
Allocation unit values are deduplicated at allocation level because one allocation value may relate to multiple habitat component rows.
Remaining figures are remaining registered area or length, not remaining biodiversity units.
The public register does not provide sufficient metric data to calculate remaining biodiversity units with confidence.
